introduction: “The Fast History Of…” is a super-charged romp through the histories of anything from iconic brands like Nike, Domino’s and Nintendo to enthralling topics like The Mob, UFOs and The Secret Lives of Billionaires. From the very beginning through today, it’s all the surprising, eye-opening and innovative moments that make up their stories….delivered in 30 minutes or less!Narrator: Adam RichmanS1 E1 - Snack SaviorsS1 E2 - Ketchup KingsS1 E3 - The Donut RevolutionS1 E4 - Gum MastersS1 E5 - Secrets of the SubS1 E6 - Fast Food InnovationsS1 E7 - The MobS1 E8 - The Tennessee WhiskeyS1 E9 - Becoming A KingS1 E10 - The SuperstoreS1 E11 - Swoosh DreamsS1 E12 - The Super RichS1 E13 - The Burger UnderdogsS1 E14 - UFOsS1 E15 - Amusement Parks
